title: Fluxora
description: Fluxora is an AI-powered analytics platform that converts natural language into SQL queries, enabling users to interact with databases without writing SQL. Built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL, it focuses on reliability through schema-aware prompting, query validation, testing, and secure database access.

title: PULSE
description: PULSE is a three-phase AI framework for analyzing vaccine hesitancy on Twitter. It combines multi-label tweet classification using Nested LSTM, category-wise summarization with LLMs, and explainable AI through LIME to uncover key narratives and improve model transparency.

title: Aayronix Hub
description: Aayronix Hub is a modern corporate website developed for a leading IT consultancy and staffing firm. The platform showcases their expertise in cloud computing, cybersecurity, AI/GenAI solutions, and global talent acquisition. Built with a multi-page architecture, it features a responsive and dynamic design, effectively highlighting their mission to empower enterprises through scalable technology solutions and strategic workforce augmentation.
